title: Air Force General Who Vanished After UFO Files Pledge Could Be Hiding in New Mexico, Investigator Claims
description: The disappearance of Air Force General William McCasland has sparked speculation due to his UFO investigation links, with theories suggesting he may be hiding in New Mexico.

title: Phoebe Bridgers pop-up concert revives UFO lore
description: On May 25, Indie musician Phoebe Bridgers performed before a sold out crowd at the Orpheum in Champaign as a part of her secret pop-up concert series. This tour has generated widespread fan speculation about where pop-up concerts will occur due to the fact that many of its stops are in communities known for UFO... The post Phoebe Bridgers pop-up concert revives UFO lore appeared first on The Daily Illini .
